infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TEMPO uses the camera only when you choose food photo estimates or form-check training cues.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TEMPO can use selected photos only when you choose to upload food or progress images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TEMPO uses location only when you start outdoor activity tracking or ask for local movement suggestions.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: TEMPO reads selected health and fitness signals to personalize training, recovery, movement, and progress insights.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: TEMPO may write workouts only when you choose to save activity back to Apple Health.
